headline.purpose: Page titles only. One per screen. `text-wrap: balance` always applied.

title.purpose: Card headings, section headings, modal titles. `text-wrap: balance`.

body.purpose: Descriptions, form labels, table content, navigation labels.

label.purpose: Card descriptions, secondary metadata, supporting copy below titles.

micro.purpose: Timestamps, mobile nav labels, the `privé · local · fr-CH` identity mark.

mono.purpose: Every currency and financial value without exception. Always tabular-nums. Always the Amount component.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Applied exclusively to the modal panel. The only shadow in the system. Structural, not decorative.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for all transitions: modal, tab indicator, filter panel. Feels physical without bouncing.

motion.name: modal-in
motion.purpose: Modal panel entrance. Scale + lift reads as a surface appearing, not a div fading in.

motion.name: backdrop-in
motion.purpose: Modal backdrop fade. Shorter than the panel animation so the backdrop leads.

motion.name: bar-reveal
motion.value: clip-path inset(0 100% 0 0) → inset(0 0% 0 0), 500ms ease-out-quart, staggered 50ms per bar
motion.purpose: Category bar reveal in the analytics chart. Clip-path reads as data populating, not decorating.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: All hover/focus/active state transitions. Fast enough to feel immediate; present enough to feel responsive.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Filter panel switches from collapsible grid to always-visible.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Layout switches from single-column + bottom nav to sidebar + content grid.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Single most important action per screen. Ink background, paper text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 1rem; border-radius: 4px; background: oklch(0.215 0.02 265); color: oklch(0.985 0.002 260); font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.215 0.02 265 / 0.85); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.215 0.02 265); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.985 0.002 260), 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.49 0.2 264); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary actions. Surface background, line-strong border, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 1rem; border-radius: 4px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.215 0.02 265); font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid oklch(0.8 0.01 265); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.962 0.004 260); } .ds-btn-outline:active { background: oklch(0.9 0.005 265 / 0.6); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.985 0.002 260), 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.49 0.2 264); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive confirmation only. Terracotta text, no background at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 1rem; border-radius: 4px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.51 0.17 27); font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.025 27); } .ds-btn-danger:active { background: oklch(0.95 0.025 27 / 0.8); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.985 0.002 260), 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.49 0.2 264); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input. Surface background, line-strong border, accent on focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.215 0.02 265); } .ds-input { height: 2.25rem; width: 100%; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.8 0.01 265); background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.215 0.02 265); font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.52 0.02 265); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.49 0.2 264); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.49 0.2 264); } .ds-input:disabled { background: oklch(0.962 0.004 260); color: oklch(0.52 0.02 265); cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Animated tab switcher with a sliding ink indicator. The smoothest transition in the system.
components.css: .ds-tabs { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; height: 2.25rem; padding: 2px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.005 265); background: oklch(0.962 0.004 260); } .ds-tabs-indicator { position: absolute; top: 2px; bottom: 2px; border-radius: 2px; background: oklch(0.215 0.02 265); transition: left 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), width 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); pointer-events: none; } .ds-tab { position: relative; z-index: 1; height: 100%; padding: 0 0.75rem; border-radius: 2px; background: transparent; border: none; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.45 0.02 265); cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-tab--active { color: oklch(1 0 0); } .ds-tab:hover:not(.ds-tab--active) { color: oklch(0.215 0.02 265); } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.49 0.2 264); outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary content container. Surface background, line border, 6px radius, 20px padding.
components.html:
Solde attendu

Calculé depuis les transactions

+CHF 3 240.50
components.css: .ds-card { border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.005 265); background: oklch(1 0 0); padding: 1.25rem; } .ds-card-header { margin-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.025em; color: oklch(0.215 0.02 265); margin: 0; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: oklch(0.45 0.02 265); margin: 2px 0 0; } .ds-amount { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-feature-settings: 'tnum'; } .ds-amount--positive { color: oklch(0.5 0.12 158); } .ds-amount--negative { color: oklch(0.51 0.17 27); } .ds-amount--neutral { color: oklch(0.215 0.02 265); }

components.name: Amount
components.description: Signature component. IBM Plex Mono, tabular-nums, four semantic tones. Every financial value goes through this.
components.html: +CHF 3 240.50−CHF 89.00CHF 3 151.50CHF 0.00
components.css: .ds-amount { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-feature-settings: 'tnum'; } .ds-amount--positive { color: oklch(0.5 0.12 158); } .ds-amount--negative { color: oklch(0.51 0.17 27); } .ds-amount--neutral { color: oklch(0.215 0.02 265); } .ds-amount--soft { color: oklch(0.45 0.02 265); }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Desktop sidebar nav. Active item gets surface background + line border. Inactive is transparent.
components.html: Tableau de bordTransactionsPaiements récurrents
components.css: .ds-sidebar-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid transparent; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.45 0.02 265); text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-item svg { color: oklch(0.52 0.02 265); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.6); color: oklch(0.215 0.02 265); } .ds-nav-item--active { border-color: oklch(0.9 0.005 265); background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.215 0.02 265); font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.49 0.2 264); outline-offset: -1px; }

narrative.overview:
A ruled private ledger kept on a banker's desk. Every column aligns, every number is legible at a glance, every stroke of chrome justifies its presence against the data it serves. The surface is light but not warm — the barely-blue neutrals carry the precision of blue-black ink rather than the ease of cream paper.

The system does not try to win anyone over. It trusts that the user is already invested. Success is a reconciled balance understood in under two seconds and a transaction logged in under five keystrokes.

Explicitly rejected: soft glassmorphism, neobank marketing aesthetics, gamified encouragement, and marketing-page theatrics applied inside a working tool.
keyCharacteristics: Cool blue-tinted neutrals throughout — paper → surface → sunken form implicit depth without shadows
IBM Plex Mono carries every financial value; tabular figures and typographic minus
Indigo Ink accent used exclusively for primary actions, focus rings, and active selection — never decoration
Green / terracotta semantic pair signals income vs expense with unambiguous meaning
Motion is state-only: 150–200 ms, out-quart easing, no choreography
Fixed type scale (not fluid): consistent viewport density, no clamp() on labels or data

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Indigo Ink is the only non-semantic accent. It appears on primary actions, active selection, and focus rings — and nowhere else.

rules.name: The Semantic Pair Rule
rules.body: Positive (green) and Negative (terracotta) are reserved exclusively for financial meaning. Never for generic UI states.

rules.name: The Mono Reserve Rule
rules.body: IBM Plex Mono is for numbers only. Not for labels, navigation, or any text that isn't a financial value.

rules.name: The Minus Rule
rules.body: Negative amounts use the typographic minus (−, U+2212), never a hyphen-minus. The Amount component handles this.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: No interactive element, card, or panel uses a shadow at rest or on hover. Shadows appear only on the modal dialog.

dos: Use IBM Plex Mono with tabular-nums for every currency value, without exception.
Use the typographic minus (−, U+2212) for negative amounts — the Amount component handles this.
Format all amounts with fr-CH locale and CHF as the default currency.
Apply text-wrap: balance to all h1–h3 elements.
Use tonal background tiers (paper → surface → sunken) to convey depth.
Keep all interactive controls at 36px height for consistent hit targets.
Use Indigo Ink exclusively for primary actions, focus rings, and active selection.
Apply the Semantic Pair (positive green / negative terracotta) only for financial state.
Render dialogs and dropdowns via createPortal to document.body.
Return focus to the trigger element when a modal closes.
donts: Don't use soft glassmorphism: blurred glass cards, pastel radial gradients, or backdrop-filter for decoration.
Don't apply neobank marketing aesthetics: purple gradients, blobby shapes, playful illustrations.
Don't add confetti, badges, streaks, or any gamified encouragement.
Don't add decorative motion that does not communicate a state change.
Don't use Indigo Ink on inactive states, decoration, or headings.
Don't use positive (green) or negative (terracotta) for anything other than financial state.
Don't pair Inter with another sans-serif. The system is Inter + IBM Plex Mono only.
Don't use box-shadow on any component that is not a portal-rendered modal dialog.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px) on cards, callouts, or list items.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't render amounts as raw text strings — always use the Amount component.
Don't nest a card inside another card.
